tabs.label: ORL Cancer & Nutrition (n=465)
tabs.heading: Prevalence of micronutrient deficiencies in 465 patients with head and neck cancers admitted to a rehabilitation unit
tabs.text: Conducted a statistical study on micronutrient deficiencies in patients with head and neck cancer. Constructed and structured clinical databases for predictive modeling. Performed univariate, multivariate, and LASSO logistic regression analyses to identify factors associated with micronutrient deficiencies.
bullets: Stack / tools: [Python, winSimbad, DxCare, Ambre, Excel, PowerPoint, Word, SharePoint]

tabs.label: ORL Cancer & Nutrition (n=204)
tabs.heading: Prevalence of micronutrient deficiencies in 204 patients with head and neck cancers admitted to a rehabilitation unit
tabs.text: Data preprocessing and statistical analysis of a cohort of 204 oncology patients. Structured and curated clinical data for oncology nutrition research. Calculated prevalences and performed subgroup comparisons using Boschloo’s exact tests. Identified six significant micronutrients associated with inflammation through Spearman correlation analyses and symbolic regression modeling, with results reported at a 95% confidence interval.
bullets: Stack / tools: [Python, winSimbad, DxCare, Ambre, Excel, PowerPoint, Word, SharePoint]

tabs.label: Stress Detection
tabs.heading: Current Research Projects
tabs.text: Harmonized multimodal physiological datasets (PPG, temperature, EDA, and accelerometer signals) and performed advanced signal preprocessing, including filtering, temporal and frequency-domain feature engineering, and dimensionality reduction. Investigated the impact of multimodal data fusion and windowing strategies on model performance. Trained and evaluated 12 machine learning models using Leave-One-Subject-Out Cross-Validation (LOSO-CV), with Bayesian hyperparameter optimization. Achieved a best F1-score of 81.9% for ternary classification. Interpreted model predictions using SHAP values and developed reproducible machine learning pipelines in a Linux environment.

tabs.label: Single-Cell RNA-seq Analysis
tabs.heading: Single-Cell RNA-seq Analysis of Cancer Samples
tabs.text: Developed a reproducible single-cell RNA-sequencing (scRNA-seq) analysis pipeline for 10x Genomics datasets using Seurat in R and R Markdown. Performed quality control, normalization, highly variable gene selection, PCA, UMAP, and graph-based clustering. Improved data quality through automated and supervised doublet detection with DoubletFinder and lineage-specific markers. Annotated cell populations using SingleR, CHETAH, and canonical marker genes. Identified cluster-specific marker genes and characterized immune and stromal cell populations within the non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) tumor microenvironment. Investigated cell–cell communication using CellChat and reconstructed lineage trajectories with Slingshot.

tabs.label: Sony Retail App
tabs.heading: [Mobile Application for Sony Retail Operations]
tabs.text: Developed a mobile application for retail stock management for Sony France. Promoted Sony products through in-store technical demonstrations and provided customer guidance on product features and technologies.

tabs.label: NutritionDayFrance
tabs.heading: [NutritionDay France]
tabs.text: Created and managed the French website for the international nutritionDay study. Adapted an international clinical research project to the French healthcare context. Provided technical maintenance and user support while coordinating national participation in a global epidemiological study.
bullets: Stack / tools: [html, ccs, javascript, php, Wordpress, Hostinger, phpMyAdmin, MySQL]

tabs.label: ECE CUP
tabs.heading: [ECE CUP]
tabs.text: Developed an autonomous robotic platform based on an ESP32 microcontroller. Implemented real-time computer vision with OpenCV to detect and localize the robot, barrels, and opponents on the playing field. Designed path-planning and obstacle-avoidance algorithms for autonomous navigation. Integrated MQTT-based wireless communication for real-time monitoring and control. Competed in an autonomous robotics challenge involving barrel collection and delivery while avoiding collisions with opponents and obstacles.
bullets: Stack / tools: [Arduino, ThinkerCad, Onshape, Ultimaker Cura]
